MELItem.Title: Passenger Entry Door Area Floor Panel Surface Heater

Note.Para: Heaters are not installed on airplane line number 726 and on.

MaintenanceProcedure.Para: Deactivate the inoperative floor panel heater (AMM DDG 21-45-04).

ListItem.Para: Using a flight deck multi-function display only, open the appropriate circuit breaker and lock with an INOP tag:
For heater at door 1 left inoperative, HEATER-DOOR 1L .
For heater at door 1 right inoperative, HEATER-DOOR 1R.
For heater at door 2 left inoperative, HEATER-DOOR 2L.
For heater at door 2 right inoperative, HEATER-DOOR 2R.
For heater at door 3 left inoperative, HEATER-DOOR 3L.
For heater at door 3 right inoperative, HEATER-DOOR 3R.
For heater at door 4 left inoperative, HEATER-DOOR 4L.
For heater at door 4 right inoperative, HEATER-DOOR 4R.
